name: Banxe — Daily Recon Report (18:00 UTC → Slack #daily-recon)

parameters.body: SELECT recon_date, status, count() as count, sum(abs(discrepancy)) as total_discrepancy FROM banxe.safeguarding_events WHERE recon_date >= today() - 7 GROUP BY recon_date, status ORDER BY recon_date DESC, status FORMAT JSON
SELECT account_id, discrepancy, days_outstanding, detected_at FROM banxe.safeguarding_breaches WHERE detected_at >= now() - INTERVAL 7 DAY ORDER BY detected_at DESC LIMIT 5 FORMAT JSON

_meta.deploy_note: Import via n8n UI http://gmktec:5678 → Workflows → Import. Requires #daily-recon Slack channel and ClickHouse HTTP interface.
